name: Labelbox Blog
description: Official Labelbox blog covering AI training data, data labeling, machine learning evaluation, and platform updates.
note: No RSS/Atom feed discovered at common paths (/blog/rss, /feed, /feed.xml, /blog/rss.xml, /blog/feed). Blog is served as a JavaScript-rendered page without a discoverable feed endpoint.
